LAW AND MOTION, 301, PETITIONER TSS PERSONNEL AGENCY,INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD -- DENIED FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE PROOF OF SERVICE PER CCP 1290.4(B). JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR# 1558.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER TSS PERSONNEL AGENCY,INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD -- GRANT. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR# 5220
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT AFTER GRANTING OF ARBITRATION AWARD
